## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] perf
- [ ] docs
- [ ] ci
- [ ] chore

## Summary

<!-- What and why, not how -->

## DDD Checklist

- [ ] Updated relevant `docs/` spec (EN)
- [ ] Updated corresponding `docs/zh-CN/` spec
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Version bumped in `pubspec.yaml` (if releasing)

## Quality Gates

- [ ] `dart analyze lib test` passes
- [ ] `dart run tool/quality_gate.dart` passes
- [ ] `dart format lib test` clean
- [ ] Tests pass (`flutter test --exclude-tags golden`)
